Transcripts only exist for sessions that produced episode cards in this exact directory's `~/.claude` key; earlier sessions likely happened under different directory keys or have aged out of the logs entirely.

Retracted most of those claims — only `~/Work/proactive-context` actually contains real proactive-context sessions; the home-directory and claude-history guesses were wrong.

Most no-card sessions were correctly skipped, but two genuinely uncaptured findings were identified: inject has no triage gate, and statusline is display-only.

"colorize output" not worth preserving??! of course its worth preserving! it adds to the nuance of the product! if the end-goal is to be able to one-shot any type of app, no matter how complex and nuanced, of course we also want to capture the smallest of details! even if the user says "oh, I don't like the border rounded to 10px, let's go to 8px instead" then that's a very nuanced and tiny product decision but for sure MUST be captured!


I don't want to fix this particular wiki, I want `pc` to capture any project's nuance properly, which would have the byproduct of capturing the missed nuance in `pc`

Proposed a three-stage plan: (1) widen the capture prompt to include cosmetic/micro product decisions, (2) add an entity-claim type for cited answers from Q&A, and (3) route question-dominated sessions as research/topic seeds.
